title: Dry Needling and Acupuncture
creator: Integrative Health Partners
excerpt: It used to be that acupuncture was rare in the United States. Acupuncturists were few and far between, not to mention shunned by the conventional medical community. Now, acupuncture research has proven its effectiveness so many practitioners in the Western medical field want to adopt it as part of their treatment protocol. Some MDs have […]
